block.header: =N(" natuswobiku unakamigata no oki tu su ni pune pa todomemu saywo pukenikyeri ")
=N(" kadusika no mama no uramwi wo kogu pune no punabito sawaku nami tatu rasi mo ")
=N(" tukupane no nipigupamaywo no kinu pa aredo kimi ga mikyesi si ayani ki posi mo ")
=N(" taratineno nipigupamaywo no kinu pa aredo kimi ga mikyesi si amata ki posi mo ")
=N(" tukupane ni yuki ka mo puraru inawokamo kanasiki kworo ga ninwo posaru ka mo ")
=N(" sinanwo n aru suga no arano ni pototogisu naku kowe kikeba toki suginikyeri ")
=N(" aratamano kipe no payasi ni na wo tatete yukikatu masizi i wo sakidatane ")
=N(" kipepito no madarabusuma ni wata sapada irinamasi mono imo ga wodoko ni ")
=N(" amanopara puzi no sibayama ko no kure no toki yuturinaba apazu ka mo aramu ")
=N(" puzinone no iya toponagaki yamadi wo mo imogari to peba ke ni yobazu kinu ")
=N(" kasumi wiru puzinoyamabwi ni wa ga kinaba iduti mukite ka imo ga nagekamu ")
=N(" sanuraku pa tama no wo bakari kwopuraku pa puzinotakane no naru sapa no goto ")
=N(" makanasimi nuraku pa sikyeraku sanaraku pa idu no takane no naru sapa nasu yo ")
=N(" apyeraku pa tama no wo sikye ya kwopuraku pa puzinotakane ni puru yuki nasu mo ")
=N(" suruga no umi osipye ni opuru pamatudura imasi wo tanomi papa ni tagapinu ")
=N(" suruga no umi osipye ni opuru pamatudura imasi wo tanomi oya ni tagapinu ")
=N(" idu no umi ni tatu siranami no aritutu mo tuginamu monowo midaresimeme ya ")
=N(" sirakumo no tayetutu mo tugamu to mope ya midaresomekyemu ")
=N(" asigara no wotemo konomo ni sasu wana no kanarumasidumi koro are pimo toku ")
=N(" sagamune no womine mikakusi wasurekuru imo ga na ywobite a wo ne si naku na ")
=N(" muzasine no womine mikakusi wasureyuku kimi ga na kakete a wo ne si nakuru ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo wo yamato pye yarite matu sida su asigarayama no sugwi no konoma ka ")
=N(" asigara no pakwone no yama ni apa makite mwi to pa nareru wo apanaku mo ayasi ")
=N(" asigara no pakwone no yama ni papukuduno pikaba yorikone sita naponaponi ")
=N(" kamakura no migwosinosaki no ipakuye no kimi ga kuyu beki kokoro pa motazi ")
=N(" makanasimi sane ni wa pa yuku kamakura no minanosegapa ni sipo mitu namu ka ")
=N(" momotusima asigarawobune aruki opomi me koso karu rame kokoro pa mopedo ")
=N(" asigari no twopi no kaputi ni iduru yu no yo ni mo tayworani kworo ga ipanaku ni ")
=N(" asigari no mama no kwosuge no sugamakura aze ka makasamu koro se tamakura ")
=N(" asigari no pakwone no nero no nikwogusa no panatuduma nare ya pimo tokazu nemu ")
=N(" asigara no misaka kasikwomi kumoriywono a ga sitabape wo kotideturu kamo ")
=N(" sagamudi no yorogi no pama no managwo nasu kwora pa kanasiku omoparuru kamo ")
=N(" tamagapa ni sarasu tedukuri sarasarani nani so ko no kwo no kokoda kanasiki ")
=N(" muzasinwo ni urapye katayaki masadeni mo noranu kimi ga na ura n idenikyeri ")
=N(" muzasinwo no wogukwi ga kigisi tatiwakare inisi yopi ywori sero ni apanapu yo ")
=N(" kwopwisikyeba swode mo puramu wo muzasinwo no ukyera ga pana no iro n idu na yume ")
=N(" ikanisite kwopwiba ka imo ni muzasinwo no ukyera ga pana no iro n idezu aramu ")
=N(" muzasinwo no kusapa moromuki ka mo kaku mo kimi ga manima ni a pa yorinisi wo ")
=N(" irimadi no opoya ga para no ipawitura pikaba nurunuru wa ni na taye sone ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo wo ado ka mo ipamu muzasinwo no ukyera ga pana no toki naki monowo ")
=N(" sakitama no tu ni woru pune no kaze wo itami tuna pa tayu tomo koto na taye sone ")
=N(" natuswobiku unapi wo sasite tobu tori no itaramu to so yo a ga sitapapesi ")
=N(" umaguta no nero no sasapa no tuyusimo no nurete wa kinaba na pa kwopuba so mo ")
=N(" umaguta no nero ni kakuriwi kaku dani mo kuni no topokaba na ga me pori semu ")
=N(" kadusika no mama no tegwona wo makoto ka mo ware ni yosu to pu mama no tegwona wo ")
=N(" kadusika no mama no tegwona ga arisikaba mama no osupi ni nami mo todoroni ")
=N(" nipodorino kadusikawase wo nipe su tomo so no kanasiki wo two ni tateme ya mo ")
=N(" a no oto sezu yukamu kwoma moga kadusika no mama no tugipasi yamazu kaywopamu ")
=N(" tukupane no nero ni kasumi wi sugwikateni ikiduku kimi wo winete yarasane ")
=N(" imo ga kadwo iya toposokinu tukupayama kakurenu potwo ni swode pa puritena ")
=N(" tukupane ni kakanaku wasi no ne nomwi wo ka nakiwatarinamu apu to pa nasi ni ")
=N(" tukupane ni sogapi ni miyuru asipoyama asikaru toga mo sane miyenaku ni ")
=N(" tukupane no ipa mo todoroni oturu midu yo ni mo tayurani wa ga omopanaku ni ")
=N(" tukupane no wotemo konomo ni moribye suwe papa i moredomo tama so apinikyeru ")
=N(" sagoromono wodukupanero no yama no saki wasurakoba kwoso na wo kakyenapamye ")
=N(" wodukupa no nero ni tuku tasi apidaywo pa sapada narinwo wo mata netemu kamo ")
=N(" wodukupa no sikeki konoma ywo tatu tori no me yu ka na wo mimu sanezaranaku ni ")
=N(" pitati n aru nasaka no umi no tamamo koso pikeba taye sure ado ka taye semu ")
=N(" pito mwina no koto pa tayu tomo panisina no isiwi no tegwo ga koto na taye sone ")
=N(" sinanwodi pa ima no parimiti karibane ni asi pumasinamu kutu pake wa ga se ")
=N(" sinanwo n aru tiguma no kapa no sazaresi mo kimi si pumiteba tama to piropamu ")
=N(" nakamana ni uki woru pune no kogidenaba apu koto katasi kyepu ni si arazupa ")
=N(" pinogure ni usupi no yama wo kwoyuru pi pa sena no ga swode mo sayani purasitu ")
=N(" a ga kwopwi pa masaka mo kanasi kusamakura tagwo no irinwo no oku mo kanasi mo ")
=N(" kamitukenwo aswo no maswomura kakimudaki nuredo akanu wo ado ka a ga semu ")
=N(" kamitukenwo wodwo no tadori ga kapadi ni mo kwora pa apanamo pitori nomwi site ")
=N(" kamitukenwo wo no tadori ga apadi ni mo sena pa apanamo miru pito nasi ni ")
=N(" kamitukenwo sanwo no kukutati woripayasi are pa matamu we kotosi kozu tomo ")
=N(" kamitukenwo magupasimadwo ni asapi sasi makirapasi mo na aritutu mireba ")
=N(" nipitayama ne ni pa tukanana wa ni yosori pasinaru kwora si ayani kanasi mo ")
=N(" ikaporo ni amakumo itugi kanumaduku pito to otapapu iza nesime twora ")
=N(" ikaporo no swopi no paripara nemokoroni oku wo na kane so masaka si yokaba ")
=N(" tagwo no ne ni yosetuna papete yosuredomo ani ku ya sidusi so no kapo yoki ni ")
=N(" kamitukyenwo kurwopo no nero no kuzupagata kanasikye kwora ni iyazakariku mo ")
=N(" twonegapa no kapase mo sirazu tada watari nami ni apu nosu apyeru kimi kamo ")
=N(" ikaporo no yasaka no wide ni tatu nwozi no araparwo made mo sane wo saneteba ")
=N(" kamitukenwo ikapo no numa ni uwekwonagwi kaku kwopwimu to ya tane motomekyemu ")
=N(" kamitukenwo kapoya ga numa no ipawitura pikaba nuretutu a wo na taye sone ")
=N(" kamitukenwo inara no numa no opowigusa yoso ni misi ywo pa ima koso masare ")
=N(" kamitukenwo sanwoda no nape no muranape ni koto pa sadametu ima pa ikani semo ")
=N(" ikapo se ywo xxxxx omopitworo kuma koso situ to wasure senapu mo ")
=N(" kamitukenwo sanwo no punapasi toripanasi oya pa sakuredo wa pa sakaru gape ")
=N(" ikapone ni kamwi na nari sone wa ga pe ni pa yuwe pa nakyedomo kwora ni yorite so ")
=N(" ikapokaze puku pi pukanu pi ari to ipedo a ga kwopwi nomwi si toki nakarikyeri ")
=N(" kamitukenwo ikapo no nero ni purwo yoki no yukisugwikatenu imo ga ipye no atari ")
=N(" simotukyenwo mikamonoyama no konara nosu magupasi kworo pa ta ga kye ka motamu ")
=N(" simotukyenwo aswo no kapara ywo isi pumazu swora yu to kinu yo na ga kokoro nore ")
=N(" apidune no kuni wo sadopomi apanapaba sinwopi ni semo to pimo musubasane ")
=N(" tukusi n aru nipopu kwo yuweni mitinoku no katworiwotomye no yupisi pimo toku ")
=N(" adatara no ne ni pusu sisi no aritutu mo are pa itaramu nedwo na sari sone ")
=N(" topotu apumi inasa posoye no miwotukusi are wo tanomete asamasi monowo ")
=N(" sida no ura wo asa kogu pune pa yosi nasi ni kogu rame kamo yo yosi kos aru rame ")
=N(" asigari no akinanoyama ni pikwo pune no siri pikasi mo yo kokoba kwogatani ")
=N(" asigari no wawokakyeyama no kadu no kwi no wa wo kadusane mo kadusakazu tomo ")
=N(" takigwikoru kamakurayama no kodaru kwi wo matu to na ga ipaba kwopwitutu ya aramu ")
=N(" kamitukyenwo aswoyamatudura nwo wo piromi papinisi monowo aze ka taye semu ")
=N(" ikaporo no swopi no paripara wa ga kinu ni tukiyorasi mo yo pitapye to omopyeba ")
=N(" siratopopu wonipitayama no moru yama no uragare senana tokopa ni moga mo ")
=N(" mitinoku no adatara mayumi pazikiokite serasimyekinaba tura pakamye kamo ")
=N(" tumuganwo ni suzu ga oto kikoyu kamusida no tono no nakati si togari su rasi mo ")
=N(" mituganwo ni suzu ga oto kikoyu kamusida no tono no wakugwo si togari su rasi mo ")
=N(" suzuganeno payuma umaya no tutumiwi no midu wo tamapena imo ga tadate ywo ")
=N(" ko no kapa ni asana arapu kwo nare mo are mo yoti wo so moteru ide kwo tabari ni ")
=N(" ko no kapa ni asana arapu kwo masi mo are mo yoti wo so moteru ide kwo tabari ni ")
=N(" matopoku no kumowi ni miyuru imo ga pye ni itu ka itaramu ayumye a ga kwoma ")
=N(" topoku site kumowi ni miyuru imo ga pye ni itu ka itaramu ayumye kurokwoma ")
=N(" adumadi no tegwonoywobisaka kwoyeganete yama ni kanemu mo yadori pa nasi ni ")
=N(" ura mo naku wa ga yuku miti ni awoyagwi no parite tatereba monomopidutu mo ")
=N(" kipatuku no woka no kukumira ware tumedo kwo ni mo mitanapu sena to tumasane ")
=N(" minatwo no asi ga naka n aru tamakwosuge kariko wa ga sekwo toko no pyedasi ni ")
=N(" imonaro ga tukapu kapadu no sasarawogwi asi to pitogoto katariyorasi mo ")
=N(" kusakage no anwo na yukamu to parisi miti anwo pa yukazute arakusa datinu ")
=N(" panadirapu ko no mukatuwo no wona no wo no pizi ni tuku made kimi ga yo moga mo ")
=N(" sirwotapeno koromo no swode wo makuraga ywo ama kogiku miyu nami tatu na yume ")
=N(" wokusawo to wogusazukyewo to sipopune no narabyete mireba wogusa kati myeri ")
=N(" sanatura no woka ni apa maki kanasiki ga kwoma pa tagu tomo wa pa swo to mo pazi ")
=N(" omosirwoki nwo woba na yaki so purukusa ni nipikusa maziri opwi pa opuru gani ")
=N(" kaze no to no topoki wagimo ga kisesi kinu tamoto no kudari maywopikinikyeri ")
=N(" nipa ni tatu asatekwobusuma koyopi dani tuma yosikosene asatekwobusuma ")
=N(" kwopwisikyeba kimase wa ga sekwo kakituyagwi ure tumikarasi ware tatimatamu ")
=N(" utusemi no yaswokotonopye pa sikeku tomo araswopikanete a wo kotonasu na ")
=N(" utipisasu miya no wa ga se pa yamatomye no piza maku gotoni a wo wasurasu na ")
=N(" nase no kwo ya tori no wokadi si nakada wore a wo ne si naku yo ikuduku madeni ")
=N(" ine tukeba kakaru a ga te wo koyopi mo ka tono no wakugwo ga torite nagekamu ")
=N(" tare so ko no ya no two osoburu nipunamwi ni wa ga se wo yarite ipapu ko no two wo ")
=N(" aze to ipye ka sane ni apanaku ni mapi kurete yopi na pa konani akyenu sida kuru ")
=N(" asipikwino yamasapabito no pito sapani mana to ipu kwo ga ayani kanasisa ")
=N(" matopoku no nwo ni mo apanamu kokoro naku satwo no minaka ni apyeru sena kamo ")
=N(" pitogoto no sikeki ni yorite mawogomo no oyazi makura pa wa pa makazi ya mo ")
=N(" komanisiki pimo tokisakete nuru gapeni ado sero to ka mo ayani kanasiki ")
=N(" makanasimi nureba koto n idu sanenapeba kokoro no woro ni norite kanasi mo ")
=N(" okuyama no makwi no itatwo wo todoto site wa ga pirakamu ni irikite nasane ")
=N(" yamadori no woro no patuwo ni kagami kakye twonapu bemi koso na ni yosorikyeme ")
=N(" yupuke ni mo koyopi to norarwo wa ga sena pa aze so mo koyopi yosi ro kimasanu ")
=N(" apimite pa titose ya inuru inawokamo are ya sika mopu kimi matigateni ")
=N(" simaraku pa netutu mo aramu wo ime nomwi ni motona miyetutu a wo ne si nakuru ")
=N(" pitoduma to aze ka so wo ipamu sikaraba ka twonari no kinu wo karite kinapamo ")
=N(" sanwoyama ni utu ya wonoto no topokadomo nemo to ka kworo ga omo ni miyeturu ")
=N(" uwedake no moto sape toyomi idete inaba idusi mukite ka imo ga nagekamu ")
=N(" kwopwitutu mo woramu to suredo yupumayama kakuresi kimi wo omopikanetu mo ")
=N(" ube kwona pa wanu ni kwopu namo tatwo tuku no nwoganapyeyukyeba kwopusikaru namo ")
=N(" ube kwona pa wanu ni kwopu namo tatwo tuku no nuganapyeyukyedo wanu ga yunopyeba ")
=N(" adumadi no tegwonoywobisaka kwoyete inaba are pa kwopwimu na noti pa apinu to ")
=N(" toposi to pu kwona no sirane ni apo sida mo apanopye sida mo na ni koso yosare ")
=N(" akamiyama kusane karisoke apasu ga pe araswopu imo si ayani kanasi mo ")
=N(" opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi kanasi imo ga tamakura panare ywodati kinwo kamo ")
=N(" arikinuno sawesawe sidumi ipye no imo ni monoipazu kinite omopigurusi mo ")
=N(" karakoromo suswo no utikape apanedomo kyesiki kokoro wo a ga mopanaku ni ")
=N(" karakoromo suswo no utikapi apanapyeba nenapye no karani kototakaritu mo ")
=N(" piru tokyeba tokyenapye pimo no wa ga sena ni apiyoru kamo yworu tokyeyasukye ")
=N(" asawora wo wokye ni pususani umasu tomo asu ki sesame ya iza se wodoko ni ")
=N(" turukitati mwi ni swopu imo wo torimi gane ne wo so nakituru tegwo ni aranaku ni ")
=N(" kanasi imo wo yuduka nabe maki mokorowo no koto to si ipaba iya katamasi ni ")
=N(" adusayumi suwe ni tama maki kaku susu so nenana narinisi oku wo kanukanu ")
=N(" opu simoto ko no motoyama no masiba ni mo noranu imo ga na kata ni idemu kamo ")
=N(" adusayumi ywora no yamapye no sigyekaku ni imoro wo tatete sanedwo parapu mo ")
=N(" adusayumi suwe pa yorinemu masaka koso pitome wo opomi na wo pasi ni okyere ")
=N(" yanagwi koso kireba paye sure yo no pito no kwopwi ni sinamu wo ikani seyo to so ")
=N(" woyamada no ike no tutumi ni sasu yanagwi nari mo narazu mo na to putari pa mo ")
=N(" osopaya mo na wo koso matame mukatuwo no sipi no kwoyade no api pa tagapazi ")
=N(" osopaya mo kimi wo si matamu mukatuwo no sipi no sayeda no toki pa sugu tomo ")
=N(" kwomotiyama wakakapyerute no momitu made nemo to wa pa mopu na pa ado ka mopu ")
=N(" ipaporo no swopi no wakamatu kagiri to ya kimi ga kimasanu uramotonaku mo ")
=N(" tatibana no kwoba no panari ga omopu namu kokoro utukusi ide are pa ikana ")
=N(" kapakami no nezirwotakagaya ayani ayani sane sanete koso koto n idenisika ")
=N(" unapara no neyaparakwosuge amata areba kimi pa wasurasu ware wasurure ya ")
=N(" woka ni yose wa ga karu kaya no sanekaya no makoto nagoya pa nero to pyena kamo ")
=N(" murasaki pa ne wo ka mo wopuru pito no kwo no uraganasikye wo ne wo wopenaku ni ")
=N(" apaworo no worota ni oparu tapamidura pikaba nurunuru a wo koto na taye ")
=N(" wa ga meduma pito pa sakuredo asagapo no tosi sape kogoto wa pa sakaru gape ")
=N(" azekagata sipopwi no yutani omopyeraba ukyera ga pana no iro n ideme ya mo ")
=N(" parubye saku pudi no uraba no ura yasuni sanuru ywo so naki kworo wo si mopeba ")
=N(" utipisasu miya no sekapa no kapobana no kwopwite ka nu ramu kiso mo koyopi mo ")
=N(" nipimurwo no kodoki ni itareba padasusuki po n idesi kimi ga miyenu ko no koro ")
=N(" tani sebami mine ni papitaru tamakadura tayemu no kokoro wa ga mopanaku ni ")
=N(" sibatuki no miurasaki n aru netukwogusa apimizu araba are kwopwime ya mo ")
=N(" takubusuma sirayamakaze no nenapyedomo kworo ga osoki no arwo koso yesi mo ")
=N(" miswora yuku kumo ni moga mo na kyepu yukite imo ni kotodopi asu kapyerikomu ")
=N(" awonero ni tanabiku kumo no isaywopi ni mono wo so omopu tosi no ko no koro ")
=N(" pitonero ni iparu mono kara awonero ni isaywopu kumo no yosorituma pa mo ")
=N(" yupusareba miyama wo saranu ninwogumo no aze ka tayemu to ipisi kworo pa mo ")
=N(" takaki ne ni kumo no tuku nosu ware sapeni kimi ni tukinana takane to mopite ")
=N(" a ga omo no wasuremu sida pa kuni papuri ne ni tatu kumo wo mitutu sinwopase ")
=N(" tusima no ne pa sitagumo aranapu kamunone ni tanabiku kumo wo mitutu sinwopamo ")
=N(" sirakumono tayenisi imo wo aze sero to kokoro ni norite kokoba kanasikye ")
=N(" ipa no pe ni ikagaru kumo no kanwomaduku pito so otapapu iza nesime twora ")
=N(" na ga papa ni korare a pa yuku awokumono ideko wagimokwo apimite yukamu ")
=N(" omokata no wasuremu sida pa oponworo ni tanabiku kumo wo mitutu sinwopamu ")
=N(" karasu to pu opowosodori no masadeni mo kimasanu kimi wo koroku to so naku ")
=N(" kiso koso pa kworo to sanesika kumo no upe yu nakiyuku tadu no matopoku omopoyu ")
=N(" saka kwoyete abe no tanomo ni wiru tadu no tomosiki kimi pa asu sape moga mo ")
=N(" mawogomo no pu no ma tikakute apanapyeba oki tu makamo no nageki so a ga suru ")
=N(" mikukunwo ni kamo no papo nosu kworo ga upe ni kotoworo papete imada nenapu mo ")
=N(" numa putatu kaywopa tori ga su a ga kokoro putayuku namo to na yomopari sone ")
=N(" oki ni sumo wokamo no mokoro yasakadori ikiduku imo wo okite kinwo kamo ")
=N(" midutorino tatamu yosopi ni imonora ni monoipazu kinite omopikanetu mo ")
=N(" toya no nwo ni wosagi nerapari wosawosa mo nenapye kwo yuweni papa ni koropaye ")
=N(" sawosika no pusu ya kusamura miyezu tomo kworo ga kanatwo ywo yukaku si yesi mo ")
=N(" imo wo koso apimi ni kosika maywobikino yokoyamapyero no sisi nasu omopyeru ")
=N(" paru no nwo ni kusa pamu kwoma no kuti yamazu a wo sinwopu ramu ipye no kworo pa mo ")
=N(" pito no kwo no kanasikye sida pa pamasudori anayumu kwoma no wosikyeku mo nasi ")
=N(" akagwoma ga kadwode wo situtu idekateni sesi wo mitatesi ipye no kwora pa mo ")
=N(" ono ga wo wo oponi na omopi so nipa ni tati wemasu ga kara ni kwoma ni apu monowo ")
=N(" akagwoma wo utite sawobiki kokorobiki ikanaru sena ka wagari komu to ipu ")
=N(" kupyegwosi ni mugi pamu kwouma no patupatuni apimisi kwora si ayani kanasi mo ")
=N(" umasegwosi mugi pamu kwoma no patupatuni nipipada puresi kworo si kanasi mo ")
=N(" piropasi wo uma kwosiganete kokoro nomwi imogari yarite wa pa koko ni site ")
=N(" wopayasi ni kwoma wo pasasake kokoro nomwi imogari yarite wa pa koko ni site ")
=N(" azu no upye ni kwoma wo tunakite ayapokato pitodumakworo wo iki ni wa ga suru ")
=N(" sawatari no tegwo ni iyukiapi akagwoma ga agaki wo payami koto topazu kinu ")
=N(" azupe kara kwoma no yukwo nosu ayapa twomo pitodumakworo wo mayukaserapumo ")
=N(" sazareisi ni kwoma wo pasasete kokoro itami a ga mopu imo ga ipye no atari kamo ")
=N(" murwogaya no turu no tutumi no narinu gani kworo pa ipyedomo imada nenaku ni ")
=N(" asukagapa sita nigoreru wo sirazusite senana to putari sanete kuyasi mo ")
=N(" asukakapa seku to siriseba amataywo mo winete komasi wo seku to siriseba ")
=N(" awoyagwi no pararwo kapatwo ni na wo matu to semidwo pa kumazu tatidwo narasu mo ")
=N(" adi no sumu susa no iriye no komorinu no ana ikidukasi mizu pisanisite ")
=N(" naru sero ni kotu no yosu nasu itonokite kanasikye sero ni pito sapye yosu mo ")
=N(" tayupigata sipo mitiwataru idu yu ka mo kanasiki sero ga wagari kaywopamu ")
=N(" ositeinato ine pa tukanedo naminopono itaburasi mo yo kiso pitori nete ")
=N(" adikama no kata ni saku nami pirase ni mo pimo toku mono ka kanasikye wo okite ")
=N(" matu ga ura ni sawawe uradati mapitogoto omoposu namo ro wa ga mopo nosu mo ")
=N(" adikama no kakye no minatwo ni iru sipo no kotetazuku mo ka irete nemaku mo ")
=N(" imo ga nuru toko no atari ni ipagukuru midu ni moga mo yo irite nemaku mo ")
=N(" makuraga no koga no watari no karakadi no otodakasi mo na nenapye kwo yuweni ")
=N(" sipobune no okareba kanasi sanetureba pitogoto sikyesi na wo do ka mo simu ")
=N(" nayamasikye pitoduma kamo yo kogu pune no wasure pa senana iya mopimasu ni ")
=N(" apazusite yukaba wosikyemu makuraga no koga kogu pune ni kimi mo apanu kamo ")
=N(" opobune wo pe yu mo tomo yu mo katametesi koso no satwobito arapasame kamo ")
=N(" makane puku nipu no masopo no iro n idete ipanaku nomwi so a ga kwopuraku pa ")
=N(" kanatwoda wo aragakima yu mi pi ga tworeba ame wo matwo nosu kimi wo to matwo mo ")
=N(" ariswo ya ni opuru tamamo no utinabiki pitori ya nu ramu a wo matikanete ")
=N(" pitagata no iswo no wakame no tatimidaye wa wo ka matu namo kiso mo koyopi mo ")
=N(" kwosugero no ura puku kaze no ado susu ka kanasikye kworo wo omopisugwosamu ")
=N(" ka no kworo to nezu ya narinamu padasusuki uranwo no yama ni tuku katayoru mo ")
=N(" wagimokwo ni a ga kwopwisinaba sowapye kamo kamwi ni oposemu kokoro sirazute ")
=N(" okite ikaba imo pa makanasi motite yuku adusa no yumi no yutuka ni moga mo ")
=N(" okurewite kwopwiba kurusi mo asagari no kimi ga yumi ni mo naramasi monowo ")
=N(" sakimori ni tatisi asake no kanatwode ni tabanare wosimi nakisi kwora pa mo ")
=N(" asi no pa ni yupugwiri tatite kamo ga ne no samuki yupupye si na woba sinwopamu ")
=N(" onoduma wo pito no satwo ni oki opoposiku mitutu so kinuru ko no miti no apida ")
=N(" ado mopye ka azikumayama no yudurupa no pupumaru toki ni kaze pukazu kamo ")
=N(" asipikwino yamakadurakage masibani mo egataki kage wo oki ya karasamu ")
=N(" wosatwo n aru panatatibana wo pikiyodite woramu to suredo urawakami koso ")
=N(" miyaziro no su ka pye ni tateru kapo ga pana na sakiide sone komete sinwopamu ")
=N(" napasiro no kwonagwi ga pana wo kinu ni suri naruru manima ni aze ka kanasikye ")
=N(" kanasi imo wo iduti yukame to yamasugeno sogapi ni nesiku ima si kuyasi mo ")
